requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety of Luminaires (CODINORM NI / IEC 60598) + VoC Certificate of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 灯具电气安全（CODINORM NI / IEC 60598）+ VoC 符合性证书
requirement_topic.zht: 燈具電氣安全（CODINORM NI / IEC 60598）+ VoC 符合性證書

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Côte d'Ivoire must meet electrical-safety requirements based on CODINORM national standards (NI) that adopt the IEC base — IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — General requirements and tests) and the relevant IEC 60598-2 part for the specific luminaire type. For self-ballasted LED lamps, IEC 62560 (and IEC 62612 for performance) is the reference. Côte d'Ivoire's grid is 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase nominal — the same 50 Hz as China and a similar 220 V single-phase nominal (note China three-phase is 380 V), so a product designed for the Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz domestic supply is generally electrically compatible. Conformity is demonstrated through the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme administered under the Ministry of Trade with CODINORM involvement: a Certificate of Conformity (per shipment, or via product/licence registration) is generally required for customs clearance at Abidjan or San-Pedro, supported by IEC 60598-based test reports from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory and French-language documentation.
summary.zh: 进口至科特迪瓦的 LED 灯具须满足基于采用 IEC 基础的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）的电气安全要求——IEC 60598-1（灯具——一般要求和试验）及具体灯具类型适用的 IEC 60598-2 部分。对自镇流 LED 灯，参考 IEC 62560（性能参考 IEC 62612）。科特迪瓦电网为 220 V / 50 Hz 单相标称——与中国相同的 50 Hz 及相似的 220 V 单相标称（注意中国三相为 380 V），故为中国 220 V / 50 Hz 民用供电设计的产品通常电气兼容。符合性通过贸易部主管、CODINORM 参与的进口符合性验证（VoC）计划证明：清关（阿比让或圣佩德罗港）通常须出具符合性证书（每批装运，或通过产品/许可注册），并以来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室的基于 IEC 60598 的检测报告及法语文件支持。
summary.zht: 進口至科特迪瓦的 LED 燈具須滿足基於採用 IEC 基礎的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）的電氣安全要求——IEC 60598-1（燈具——一般要求和試驗）及具體燈具類型適用的 IEC 60598-2 部分。對自鎮流 LED 燈，參考 IEC 62560（性能參考 IEC 62612）。科特迪瓦電網為 220 V / 50 Hz 單相標稱——與中國相同的 50 Hz 及相似的 220 V 單相標稱（注意中國三相為 380 V），故為中國 220 V / 50 Hz 民用供電設計的產品通常電氣兼容。符合性通過貿易部主管、CODINORM 參與的進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃證明：清關（阿比讓或聖佩德羅港）通常須出具符合性證書（每批裝運，或通過產品/許可注冊），並以來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室的基於 IEC 60598 的檢測報告及法語文件支持。

standards_or_laws: CODINORM national standards (NI) adopting IEC 60598-1 / IEC 60598-2 (luminaire safety) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps)
Verification of Conformity (VoC) import programme — Ministry of Trade / CODINORM (Certificate of Conformity for customs clearance)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 7000.1 (Luminaires — General requirements and tests, aligned with IEC 60598-1) plus the relevant GB 7000.2xx part, and GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 for LED lamps (aligned with IEC 62560 / 62612). For many luminaire and lamp categories, CCC certification (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and is mandatory for the Chinese market. CCC test reports are issued by Chinese designated certification bodies and accredited labs. The Chinese grid is 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase (and 380 V three-phase).
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 7000.1（灯具——一般要求和试验，与 IEC 60598-1 对齐）及相关 GB 7000.2xx 部分，以及 LED 灯的 GB 24906 / GB/T 24908（与 IEC 62560 / 62612 对齐）。对许多灯具和灯类别，CCC 认证（中国强制性产品认证）涵盖电气安全并为中国市场强制要求。CCC 检测报告由中国指定认证机构及认可实验室出具。中国电网为 220 V / 50 Hz 单相（及 380 V 三相）。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 7000.1（燈具——一般要求和試驗，與 IEC 60598-1 對齊）及相關 GB 7000.2xx 部分，以及 LED 燈的 GB 24906 / GB/T 24908（與 IEC 62560 / 62612 對齊）。對許多燈具和燈類別，CCC 認證（中國強制性產品認證）涵蓋電氣安全並為中國市場強制要求。CCC 檢測報告由中國指定認證機構及認可實驗室出具。中國電網為 220 V / 50 Hz 單相（及 380 V 三相）。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 / GB 7000.2xx — Luminaires general and particular requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 60598)
GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 — LED lamps safety/performance (aligned with IEC 62560 / 62612); CCC certification

gap.en: The technical safety base is shared: China's GB 7000 / GB 24906 are aligned with IEC 60598 / IEC 62560, the same IEC family adopted by CODINORM NI, and both grids are 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase — so a Chinese-certified product is generally electrically and technically suitable, with limited re-testing. The gaps are procedural and documentary: (1) the accepted clearance document is the VoC Certificate of Conformity, not the Chinese CCC certificate — CCC is not recognised by Côte d'Ivoire customs; (2) test reports should be traceable to IEC 60598 and issued by an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory (most Chinese CNAS labs qualify, but confirm market scope); (3) all documentation, marking, and instructions must be in French; (4) an in-country importer must handle the VoC application and clearance. Confirm whether per-shipment certification or a product/licence registration route applies with the appointed conformity-assessment body before shipment.
gap.zh: 技术安全基础共通：中国 GB 7000 / GB 24906 与 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 对齐，与 CODINORM NI 采用的 IEC 体系相同，两电网均为 220 V / 50 Hz 单相——故中国认证产品通常电气和技术上适用，重新测试有限。差距在于程序和文件：（1）被接受的清关文件是 VoC 符合性证书，而非中国 CCC 证书——CCC 不被科特迪瓦海关认可；（2）检测报告应可追溯至 IEC 60598 并由 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具（多数中国 CNAS 实验室符合，但请确认市场范围）；（3）所有文件、标注和说明须为法语；（4）须由在地进口商办理 VoC 申请和清关。请在装运前与指定合格评定机构确认适用每批装运认证还是产品/许可注册路径。
gap.zht: 技術安全基礎共通：中國 GB 7000 / GB 24906 與 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 對齊，與 CODINORM NI 採用的 IEC 體系相同，兩電網均為 220 V / 50 Hz 單相——故中國認證產品通常電氣和技術上適用，重新測試有限。差距在於程序和文件：（1）被接受的清關文件是 VoC 符合性證書，而非中國 CCC 證書——CCC 不被科特迪瓦海關認可；（2）檢測報告應可追溯至 IEC 60598 並由 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具（多數中國 CNAS 實驗室符合，但請確認市場範圍）；（3）所有文件、標註和說明須為法語；（4）須由在地進口商辦理 VoC 申請和清關。請在裝運前與指定合格評定機構確認適用每批裝運認證還是產品/許可注冊路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety per CODINORM NI (IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 base) demonstrated through the import VoC programme; a Certificate of Conformity is generally required for customs clearance at Abidjan / San-Pedro.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 7000.1 / GB 24906 electrical safety and CCC certification required for relevant luminaire/lamp categories sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire electrical safety in Côte d'Ivoire is assessed against IEC 60598 / IEC 62560-based CODINORM national standards (NI) and demonstrated through the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme; a Certificate of Conformity is generally required for clearance at Abidjan or San-Pedro. The safety base is shared with China's GB 7000 / GB 24906 and both grids are 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase, so re-testing is limited — but Chinese CCC is not the accepted clearance document. Use IEC 60598 test reports from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory, provide French-language documentation, and appoint an in-country importer to handle the VoC application. Confirm the per-shipment vs product/licence registration route with the appointed body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科特迪瓦的 LED 灯具电气安全依据基于 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）评定，并通过进口符合性验证（VoC）计划证明；清关（阿比让或圣佩德罗港）通常须符合性证书。安全基础与中国 GB 7000 / GB 24906 共通，两电网均为 220 V / 50 Hz 单相，故重新测试有限——但中国 CCC 不是被接受的清关文件。请使用来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室的 IEC 60598 检测报告、提供法语文件，并委托在地进口商办理 VoC 申请。请在装运前与指定机构确认每批装运还是产品/许可注册路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科特迪瓦的 LED 燈具電氣安全依據基於 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）評定，並通過進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃證明；清關（阿比讓或聖佩德羅港）通常須符合性證書。安全基礎與中國 GB 7000 / GB 24906 共通，兩電網均為 220 V / 50 Hz 單相，故重新測試有限——但中國 CCC 不是被接受的清關文件。請使用來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室的 IEC 60598 檢測報告、提供法語文件，並委托在地進口商辦理 VoC 申請。請在裝運前與指定機構確認每批裝運還是產品/許可注冊路徑。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer, French Documentation and Customs Marking (Côte d'Ivoire)
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商、法语文件及海关标注（科特迪瓦）
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商、法語文件及海關標註（科特迪瓦）

summary.en: Placing LED luminaires on the Côte d'Ivoire market in practice requires an in-country importer / consignee of record who handles customs clearance at Abidjan or San-Pedro and is the local point of responsibility — there is no facility for a foreign manufacturer to self-clear. Product marking, the rating plate, user/installation instructions, warnings, and any conformity documentation must be available in French (the official language). The importer typically files the Verification of Conformity (VoC) application and presents the Certificate of Conformity to customs, along with commercial documents (invoice, packing list, etc.). Smart luminaires additionally need ARTCI radio approval (see ledci-emc-02). Product marking should show the manufacturer, model/type, rated voltage/frequency (220 V / 50 Hz), power, and relevant safety markings consistent with the IEC 60598 base.
summary.zh: 实务中，将 LED 灯具投放科特迪瓦市场须有在地进口商/记录收货人，负责在阿比让或圣佩德罗港清关并作为当地责任主体——外国制造商无自行清关途径。产品标注、铭牌、用户/安装说明、警告及任何符合性文件须备有法语（官方语言）。进口商通常提交符合性验证（VoC）申请并向海关出示符合性证书，连同商业文件（发票、装箱单等）。智能灯具另须 ARTCI 无线电批准（见 ledci-emc-02）。产品标注应显示制造商、型号/类型、额定电压/频率（220 V / 50 Hz）、功率及与 IEC 60598 基础一致的相关安全标识。
summary.zht: 實務中，將 LED 燈具投放科特迪瓦市場須有在地進口商/記錄收貨人，負責在阿比讓或聖佩德羅港清關並作為當地責任主體——外國製造商無自行清關途徑。產品標註、銘牌、用戶/安裝說明、警告及任何符合性文件須備有法語（官方語言）。進口商通常提交符合性驗證（VoC）申請並向海關出示符合性證書，連同商業文件（發票、裝箱單等）。智能燈具另須 ARTCI 無線電批准（見 ledci-emc-02）。產品標註應顯示製造商、型號/類型、額定電壓/頻率（220 V / 50 Hz）、功率及與 IEC 60598 基礎一致的相關安全標識。

standards_or_laws: Côte d'Ivoire import / customs framework — in-country importer (consignee of record) for clearance at Abidjan / San-Pedro
French-language product marking, instructions and documentation requirement (Ministry of Trade / CODINORM)

summary.en: In China, the domestic market-access responsibility sits with the manufacturer / domestic seller, and product marking and instructions are in Chinese per GB requirements. There is no foreign-importer-of-record concept for the domestic Chinese market, and CCC documentation is in Chinese. The Chinese marking and Chinese-language documentation are not sufficient for Côte d'Ivoire, which requires French and a local importer.
summary.zh: 在中国，国内市场准入责任由制造商/国内销售方承担，产品标注和说明依 GB 要求为中文。中国国内市场无外国记录进口商概念，CCC 文件为中文。中国标注和中文文件对科特迪瓦不足，科特迪瓦要求法语及当地进口商。
summary.zht: 在中國，國內市場准入責任由製造商/國內銷售方承擔，產品標註和說明依 GB 要求為中文。中國國內市場無外國記錄進口商概念，CCC 文件為中文。中國標註和中文文件對科特迪瓦不足，科特迪瓦要求法語及當地進口商。

standards_or_laws: GB product marking / instruction requirements (Chinese language) — domestic manufacturer/seller responsibility
No foreign-importer-of-record concept for the domestic Chinese market

gap.en: Two operational gaps a Chinese manufacturer must close for Côte d'Ivoire that do not exist for the domestic Chinese market: (1) Appoint an in-country importer / consignee of record — a foreign manufacturer cannot self-clear at Abidjan or San-Pedro; the importer files the VoC application, presents the Certificate of Conformity, and is the local responsibility point. (2) Translate all product marking, the rating plate, user/installation instructions, warnings, and conformity documentation into French; Chinese-only materials are not acceptable. Additional notes: align the rating plate to 220 V / 50 Hz (compatible with the Chinese domestic single-phase supply); ensure safety markings are consistent with the IEC 60598 base; and route smart/wireless products through ARTCI separately. Plan the importer relationship and French documentation early, as they gate customs clearance.
gap.zh: 中国制造商出口科特迪瓦须弥补、而中国国内市场不存在的两个操作差距：（1）委托在地进口商/记录收货人——外国制造商无法在阿比让或圣佩德罗港自行清关；进口商提交 VoC 申请、出示符合性证书并作为当地责任主体。（2）将所有产品标注、铭牌、用户/安装说明、警告及符合性文件翻译为法语；仅中文材料不可接受。补充说明：使铭牌符合 220 V / 50 Hz（与中国国内单相供电兼容）；确保安全标识与 IEC 60598 基础一致；并将智能/无线产品单独通过 ARTCI。请尽早规划进口商关系及法语文件，因其为清关前置条件。
gap.zht: 中國製造商出口科特迪瓦須彌補、而中國國內市場不存在的兩個操作差距：（1）委托在地進口商/記錄收貨人——外國製造商無法在阿比讓或聖佩德羅港自行清關；進口商提交 VoC 申請、出示符合性證書並作為當地責任主體。（2）將所有產品標註、銘牌、用戶/安裝說明、警告及符合性文件翻譯為法語；僅中文材料不可接受。補充說明：使銘牌符合 220 V / 50 Hz（與中國國內單相供電兼容）；確保安全標識與 IEC 60598 基礎一致；並將智能/無線產品單獨通過 ARTCI。請盡早規劃進口商關係及法語文件，因其為清關前置條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country importer / consignee of record is required for customs clearance, and French-language product marking, instructions and documentation are required for the Côte d'Ivoire market.
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — domestic Chinese market uses manufacturer/seller responsibility and Chinese-language marking; no foreign-importer-of-record concept

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Selling LED luminaires in Côte d'Ivoire requires an in-country importer / consignee of record to clear customs at Abidjan or San-Pedro and act as the local responsibility point — a foreign manufacturer cannot self-clear. All product marking, the rating plate, instructions, warnings, and conformity documentation must be in French; Chinese-only materials are insufficient. Align the rating plate to 220 V / 50 Hz, keep safety markings consistent with the IEC 60598 base, and route smart/wireless products through ARTCI separately. Plan the importer relationship and French documentation early, as they gate customs clearance and the VoC certificate presentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在科特迪瓦销售 LED 灯具须有在地进口商/记录收货人在阿比让或圣佩德罗港清关并作为当地责任主体——外国制造商无法自行清关。所有产品标注、铭牌、说明、警告及符合性文件须为法语；仅中文材料不足。使铭牌符合 220 V / 50 Hz、保持安全标识与 IEC 60598 基础一致，并将智能/无线产品单独通过 ARTCI。请尽早规划进口商关系及法语文件，因其为清关及 VoC 证书出示的前置条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在科特迪瓦銷售 LED 燈具須有在地進口商/記錄收貨人在阿比讓或聖佩德羅港清關並作為當地責任主體——外國製造商無法自行清關。所有產品標註、銘牌、說明、警告及符合性文件須為法語；僅中文材料不足。使銘牌符合 220 V / 50 Hz、保持安全標識與 IEC 60598 基礎一致，並將智能/無線產品單獨通過 ARTCI。請盡早規劃進口商關係及法語文件，因其為清關及 VoC 證書出示的前置條件。
